briefing.headline: Rig up a Ned Rig — aggressive spawn approach for stained water.
briefing.gameplan:
The Ned Rig is a strong choice for spawn with stained water and pre frontal conditions.

Wheeler: Switch to Ned rig (1/4-oz head, same baits as dropshot) when smallmouth are going down and nipping the dropshot weight instead of the bait

Key adjustment for pre frontal: aggressive, faster retrieves — fish are feeding actively before the front.

primaryApproach.retrieve: Wheeler: Switch to Ned rig (1/4-oz head, same baits as dropshot) when smallmouth are going down and nipping the dropshot weight instead of the bait
primaryApproach.targets: Focus on flat, grass, dock. Work the transitions and edges where structure changes.

alternateApproach.retrieve: Wheeler: In stained water, use a chartreuse jig head on the traditional Ned rig for added visual edge with a 3-inch stick bait.
alternateApproach.targets: Focus on flat, grass, dock. Work the transitions and edges where structure changes.

proInsights.insight: Yamamoto pro Fukae: Uses 14-lb YGK sinking braid to an 8-lb fluorocarbon leader for spawn-time drop-shot and Ned Rig presentations on a Shimano Expride 170M with 2500-size spinning reel

KVD: 'Don't assume you must finesse spawning bass. At the 2011 Classic, 4 of top 7 finishers power fished spinnerbaits and crankbaits on the same 150-yard spawning flat. Key conditions: hard bottom flat with stumps + grass, 10-degree water temp ri...
Johnston: Garmin Perspective Mode is critical for bed fishing in low-visibility conditions. Relied heavily on it along with the Power-Pole Move trolling motor for targeting bed fish.

briefing.depthStrategy: Pre-frontal spawning bass are active on beds in 2-5ft. Falling pressure often triggers new waves of fish to move onto beds. Target hard-bottom spawning flats, secondary pockets, and protected coves.
adjustIf: If the front stalls and conditions stabilize, dial back aggression and focus on higher-percentage structure
If water clears significantly, downsize presentations and move to natural color patterns
If you get followers without commits, add scent or downsize your hook/weight
